properties.body:
[Bay of Bothnia] FINNISH NAV WARN 256/26
BAY OF BOTHNIA
FIRING EXERCISES AT LOHTAJA 12-16 OF MAY 2026.
THE DANGER AREA IS THE SEA AREA BETWEEN KOKKOLA AND RAAHE.
TRAFFIC MAY BE RESTRICTED IF NECESSARY.
VESSELS ARE ADVICED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION.
FOR MORE INFORMATION, CONTACT BOTHNIA VTS ON VHF CHANNEL 67.
